name: Town Square
description: You are standing in the center of a bustling town square. Cobblestone paths lead in several directions, and a large fountain bubbles cheerfully in the center.

exits.description: A narrow lane leads east to the market.

extraDescriptions.description: The fountain is carved from white marble, water cascading gently into a wide basin.

name: North Road
description: A wide cobblestone road stretches northward from the town square. Tall oak trees line both sides, providing shade.

exits.description: The town square lies to the south.

name: Market Street
description: A busy market street lined with vendor stalls and colorful awnings. The smell of fresh bread and exotic spices fills the air.

exits.description: The town square is to the west.
